scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,customer,admin,delivery -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js backend 5000 ./local-commerce-platform/backend npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js customer 5173 ./local-commerce-platform/customer-app npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js admin 5174 ./local-commerce-platform/admin-dashboard/admin-dashboard npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js delivery 5175 ./local-commerce-platform/delivery-dashboard npm run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n backend,customer,admin,delivery,supplier,vendor -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,white "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js backend 5000 ./local-commerce-platform/backend npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js customer 5173 ./local-commerce-platform/customer-app npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js admin 5174 ./local-commerce-platform/admin-dashboard/admin-dashboard npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js delivery 5175 ./local-commerce-platform/delivery-dashboard npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js supplier 5176 ./local-commerce-platform/supplier-dashboard npm run dev" "node ./scripts/run-dev-service.js vendor 5177 ./local-commerce-platform/vendor-dashboard/vendor-dashboard npm run dev"
scripts.release:check: npm run build:customer && npm run build:admin && npm run build:delivery && npm run build:supplier && npm run build:vendor && npm run smoke:api
